comment.body:
For anyone who is new, the limitations of Substack leads to a lot of confusion. My 2 cents on how to approach using Alma's Substack is below.... pro tip is to BOOKMARK the links in your browser:

** Review each Weekly Post every Monday (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/market-analysis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)
** Review each Daily Post at beginning of the day (same link as above)

** Have two windows open for Chats everyday:
---- New Daily Chat set up each day 
---- Trading Signals Chat (Alma provides trading signals occasionally as a courtesy - don't expect signals all the time! This chat was set up on February 3 soon after Alma opened up the Substack; link is https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4)

** Educate yourselves with these chats and posts by reading through them, maybe even more than once:
---- Ongoing Q&A Chat (set up on February 26; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/398075ab-2aac-41d1-bf37-8fda43ccf9aa) 
---- Options Depth Heat Map Overview (set up on February 5; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002)
---- Educational Posts (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/educational-posts) 

Every so often I will copy and re-paste this post into chats when new folks jump in. Hope this helps!!!

comment.body: Yeah, but it ain’t Alma’s fault. People here keep acting like rookie retail traders. These have been wild times, you can’t even imagine the chaos the funds have been through, and it isn’t over until we see real progress, like Alma keeps stressing. And don’t forget, she was the first I saw calling the “hidden QE” before opex, and she nailed it, way before Nomura or Goldman’s inside reports, while still warning about the very real risks. You’re just salty ’cause your FOMO’s kicking in. Plus, today she pointed out that Trump’s announcement was timed to halt a pullback, and that’s exactly what happened. Folks really need to learn how to interpret texts. You’ve all been handed tons of top-tier analysis
